generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events show that our current laws are outdated and can't keep up with modern threats. Expanding security powers isn't about restricting freedoms - it's about protecting them. Look at how other stable democracies handle this: they balance security and liberty effectively. We can too, if we update our approach. It's our responsibility to ensure public safety without compromising our values. #SecurityFirst #ModernDeterrence
